scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @voice-codex/api" "npm run dev --workspace @voice-codex/web"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build --workspace @voice-codex/desktop && concurrently -n web,desktop -c green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @voice-codex/web" "ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:5173 npm run start --workspace @voice-codex/desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @voice-codex/api && npm run build --workspace @voice-codex/web && npm run build --workspace @voice-codex/desktop
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start --workspace @voice-codex/api" "npm run preview --workspace @voice-codex/web"
